title: Zayvora: Local Research Engine
author: Orchade Team
content:
Zayvora is a local-first research engine that indexes knowledge snippets and ranks relevance with lightweight heuristics.

This vanilla rebuild keeps the same information architecture while removing framework overhead.

title: Orchade Graph Inference
summary: How concept edges are scored in a browser-only stack.
author: System Lab
content: Graph inference in Orchade computes edge confidence by counting tag overlap and recency weighting.

title: Static Search Ranking
summary: Simple weighted ranking across title, tags and summary.
author: System Lab
content: Title matches are weighted highest, followed by tags, then summary text matches.
